channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Blind boxes and dopamine: Understanding their impact on children
item.description: Blind boxes, which contain mystery toys, are not classified as gambling under Australian law. While they don't meet the legal criteria for gambling—such as the possibility of losing money—they share n...

item.title: Kenyan Creator Reveals Cost of Hair Transplant Procedure
item.description: Kenyan content creator Tileh Pacbro has shared the cost of his hair transplant procedure, revealing that he spent KSh 230,000 to restore his hairline through a procedure involving approximately 1,800 ...

item.title: The Onion's Satirical Take on Infowars and Its Legal Battle with Alex Jones
item.description: The Onion, a satirical news organization, has launched a parody of Alex Jones' Infowars platform, aiming to highlight the legal and ethical controversies surrounding the conspiracy theorist. The parod...

item.title: Pete Hoekstra's Claims About Canada Funding the Gordie Howe Bridge Spark Controversy
item.description: The article details the controversy surrounding Pete Hoekstra’s assertion that Canada is funding the Gordie Howe Bridge, a claim that has drawn criticism from officials like Matthew Moroun, the owner ...

item.title: Golden Penny Recognizes Top Dealers with ₦266 Million in Prizes and New Product Launch
item.description: Golden Penny Foods, the iconic brand of Flour Mills of Nigeria (FMN), hosted its 2026 B2C Dealers and Sales Conference at Balmoral Hall in Ikeja, rewarding dealers with over ₦266 million in cash prize...

item.title: Verstappen criticizes F1's Lego car parade as unprofessional
item.description: Max Verstappen, Red Bull's four-time F1 world champion, has criticized Formula One's decision to have drivers parade in Lego cars during the British Grand Prix. The Dutch driver argued that the initia...

item.title: Alexa Ilacad and JC Alcantara Participate in Telepathy Challenge

item.title: Survival Of The Thickest Season Three Soundtrack Features Janelle Monáe, Kendrick Lamar, and More
item.description: The third and final season of the Netflix comedy-drama 'Survival Of The Thickest' has premiered, with its soundtrack featuring a curated list of tracks by prominent artists. Created by Michelle Buteau...

item.title: DMK MLA Arrested in Tamil Nadu for Alleged Derogatory Remarks About CM Vijay
item.description: Anitha R Radhakrishnan, a DMK MLA and former Tamil Nadu minister, was arrested for making allegedly derogatory remarks about Chief Minister M K Stalin. The arrest occurred hours after the Madras High ...

item.title: Abandoned by Foster Family, Young Man Builds New Life in Kenya
item.description: Andrew Nyawiri, a 23-year-old American citizen, recounts being abandoned by his foster family at a Kenyan airport at age 13. After spending nine years surviving on Nairobi's streets, he found temporar...

item.title: Canada's World Cup Squad Families Support Team's Historic Run
item.description: The article highlights the behind-the-scenes support systems of Canada's men's national soccer team as they made history by reaching the World Cup round of 16. Family members played a crucial role in ...

item.title: New macOS Malware Steals Credentials Using Advanced Techniques
item.description: Researchers discovered a previously unseen macOS malware called PamStealer, which employs sophisticated methods to steal user credentials. The malware operates in two stages: the first is a disk image...

item.title: Kathryn's Role in 'Someone, Someday' Series Highlighted
item.description: The article discusses Kathryn Bernardo's portrayal as an empowered woman in the feel-good television series 'Someone, Someday,' produced by ABS-CBN Studios. Published on July 4, 2026, the piece emphas...

item.title: FCT launches clean cooking initiative to improve public health
item.description: The Federal Capital Territory (FCT) Authority has expanded its clean cooking initiative, providing liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) cylinders and health insurance to over 10,000 households in Bwari Area ...

item.title: Madlanga Commission to Address Feroz Khan Testimony Amid Shooting
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry is set to proceed with hearings related to suspended police crime intelligence deputy head Feroz Khan, who remains hospitalized after being shot. Despite Khan's sche...

item.title: Heatwave in France, Belgium, and Netherlands Linked to 3,700 Excess Deaths
item.description: A heatwave across Europe from June 20-28 caused 3,700 excess deaths in France, Belgium, and the Netherlands, with authorities warning the numbers may rise. France recorded 2,025 deaths, Belgium 1,200,...

item.title: Kasipul MP Boyd Were Completes Master’s Degree in Finance and Investments
item.description: Kasipul MP Boyd Were has officially graduated with a Master’s Degree in Finance and Investments, a milestone that has sparked widespread celebration among Kenyans. The young legislator shared photos f...

item.title: Calgary Police Seek Suspect in Downtown Assault
item.description: Calgary police are appealing to the public for assistance in identifying a man suspected of perpetrating a violent assault in downtown Calgary on June 14, 2026. The incident occurred around 1:45 a.m. ...

item.title: Pakistan PM Shehbaz Visits Türkiye for Bilateral Talks and Regional Security Discussions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif arrived in Istanbul on Friday for an official visit to Türkiye, invited by Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan. The visit aims to strengthen bilateral cooperation betw...

item.title: Tanzania and Mozambique Strengthen Strategic Partnership for Regional Cooperation
